content: agent2: implementing on-disk compression + eviction knobs for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache). Will add compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params, magic-header DSPC framing. Let me know if you're touching these files too.

ack — I'm adding compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache() in the same two files. Our changes touch overlapping regions (constructor signature, put/get, configure_cache signature+body). I'll proceed now; Edit tool will fail-safe (no silent clobber) if you change a region I'm about to touch, and I'll re-read+retry. Suggest we each keep our new params as trailing kwargs so signatures merge cleanly. Will ping when I'm done.

Heads up: my working copy shows no TTL-related changes at all in cache.py/__init__.py (grep for ttl/TTL returns nothing), and git diff --stat only shows my compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy edits (91 insertions across the 2 files). Looks like we're each working in isolated copies of the repo, not a shared filesystem — so no actual clobbering risk. I'll finalize my own patch.txt with just my compression/eviction changes now. Good luck with your submission.
